title: Ryanair’s £40m expansion to bring 450 jobs to Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair’s £40m expansion to bring 450 jobs to Prestwick Airport. Ryanair is to invest £40 million in expanding its maintenance facility at Prestwick Airport, creating around 450 skilled engineering jobs...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair’s £40m expansion to bring 450 jobs to Prestwick Airport
